zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Nicholas Poyntz於1380年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓時，他的父親Robert Poyntz21歲，母親Katherine FitzNichol20歲。他於大約1439年與Elizabeth Hussey在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1424年被列為escheator of gloucester。他去世於1460年9月20日在英國格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 白 希雷斯特享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Nicholas Poyntz于1380年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓时，他的父亲Robert Poyntz21岁，母亲Katherine FitzNichol20岁。他于大约1439年与Elizabeth Hussey在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1424年被列为escheator of gloucester。他去世于1460年9月20日在英国格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 白 希雷斯特享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Poyntz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Points
meanings: from the Old French personal name Ponz, Ponce, from Latin Pontius (see Ponce ).

habitational name from any of several places called Ponts (such as those in Manche and in Seine-Maritime, Normandy), from Latin pontes ‘bridges’. This name has been established since the 13th century in Ireland, where it appears as Pounce and Pounche, and is Gaelicized as Púinse.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Nicholas Poyntz was born in 1380, in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Robert Poyntz, was 21 and his mother, Katherine FitzNichol, was 20. He married Elizabeth Hussey about 1439, in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. In 1424, his occupation is listed as escheator of gloucester. He died on 20 September 1460, in Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Nicholas Poyntz est né en 1380, à Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Poyntz, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Katherine FitzNichol, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Hussey environ 1439, à Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. En 1424, sa profession de son indiquée est escheator of gloucester. Il est décédé le 20 septembre 1460, à Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Nicholas Poyntz 1380 in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Poyntz 21 und seine Mutter Katherine FitzNichol 20. Er hat um 1439 in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Hussey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1424 ist sein Beruf als escheator of gloucester aufgeführt. Er starb am 20. September 1460 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Hussey circa 1439, nel Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Poyntzが1380年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアイロン アクトンで生まれた時，父Robert Poyntzは21歳，母Katherine FitzNicholは20歳であった。約1439年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアイロン アクトンでElizabeth Husseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1424年，職業はescheator of gloucesterと記録されている。彼は1460年9月20日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフランプトン ビー シアーエンセスターで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Poyntz(이)가 1380년 영국 그루스스터실르 이런 악턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Poyntz(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine FitzNichol(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1439년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 이런 악턴에서 Elizabeth Hussey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1424년, 그의 직업은 escheator of gloucester이었다. 그는 1460년 9월 20일 영국 그루스스터실르 프램프턴 비 시렌스스터에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Poyntz nasceu em 1380, em Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Poyntz, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Katherine FitzNichol, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Hussey aproximadamente 1439, em Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Nicholas Poyntz родился в 1380 г. в местности ирон актон, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Poyntz было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Katherine FitzNichol, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Hussey около 1439 г. в местности ирон актон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. В 1424 году он работал по профессии escheator of gloucester. Он умер 20 сентября 1460 г. в местности фрамптон би сиренсестир, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 80 лет.
